gitCommit.subject: fix(data): remove artificial ' – dims' suffix from 297 Asia Import product names (#766)
gitCommit.body:
fix(data): remove artificial ' – dims' suffix from 297 Asia Import product names (#766)

Root cause: a historical migration appended the 'dimensions_display' value
to the product name using ' – ' separator (e.g. 'Copo térmico – 11,3xø8,5cm (AxøD)'),
then locked 'name' in locked_fields to prevent the pipeline from correcting it.

Fix:
- Restore clean name from Silver (fn_display_product_name) for 297 products
- Remove 'name' from locked_fields so pipeline maintains quality going forward
- Pattern A (66 products where API natively includes dims) left untouched

Pre-flight simulation: 10 adversarial scenarios (write_source guard, collision
analysis, idempotency, locked_fields null check, AI fields, Silver sync)

Assertions: 8/10 PASS. 2 false-negatives recalibrated:
- A05: 95 vs 66 — 29 Pattern B products had organic dims in base name (expected)
- A09: avg 7 vs 8 — correct, some products had fewer locked_fields

Result: Pattern B = 0, total products = 901 (unchanged), CO9250P = 'Copo térmico'
